Wall Street rebounds with inflation cooling down. Small caps rise; Russell 2000 up by 1.8%. Gold up 2% to $5,000; Silver surges 4% to $77 per ounce. Bitcoin climbs 4.6%. Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ: AMAT) soars 9%. Arista Networks Inc. (NYSE: up as well.

Tech selloff rebounded on Wall Street post inflation rate drop to 2.4% in January; small caps surged with Russell 2000 up by 1.8%. Gold increased by 2% to trade above $5,000, silver rose nearly 4% to $77/oz, Bitcoin gained 4.6%. Applied Materials up by 9%.
